title: lastrea cystopteroides
intro: Lastrea cystopteroides, also known as the Eastern Lady Fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Lastrea cystopteroides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
